orig_full = "إِنَّمَا الْمُؤْمِنُونَ الَّذِينَ إِذَا أُنْذِرُوا بِسُوءٍ أَخَذُوا فِي أَيْدِيهِمْ وَالْأَبْرَارُ أُولَئِكَ الَّذِينَ أَتَوْا الْأَحْزَابَ مَا أَتَوْا الْأَحْزَابَ فَإِنَّ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ لَمْ يَكُونُوا لِلْفَاحِشَاتِ سَبِيلًا"
snippet = "إِنَّمَا ا...ِ سَبِيلًا"
len(orig_full)

# Normalization functions
import re
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
tatweel = '\u0640'
def normalize_arabic(s):
    if not isinstance(s, str):
        return ""
    s2 = s.replace(tatweel, '')
    s2 = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s2)
    # unify hamza forms to alif
    s2 = re.sub('[إأآٱ]', 'ا', s2)
    s2 = re.sub('ؤ', 'و', s2)
    s2 = re.sub('ئ', 'ي', s2)
    s2 = re.sub('ة', 'ه', s2)
    # remove punctuation and non-letters/digits spaces
    s2 = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ', s2, flags=re.UNICODE)
    s2 = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s2).strip().lower()
    return s2

def tokenize(s):
    return normalize_arabic(s).split()

nf_orig = normalize_arabic(orig_full)
nf_orig[:200], nf_orig[-60:], len(nf_orig)

# Precompute normalized ayah_text for each verse
for v in quran:
    v['norm'] = normalize_arabic(v['ayah_text'])

# Look for "انما المومنون الذين اذا" substring
query1 = "انما المومنون الذين اذا"
matches1 = [v for v in quran if query1 in v['norm']]
len(matches1), [(m['surah_id'], m['ayah_id'], m['ayah_text'][:50]) for m in matches1[:5]]
matches1[0]['ayah_text']

cand = matches1[0]
def token_f1(a,b):
    A = tokenize(a)
    B = tokenize(b)
    ca = collections.Counter(A)
    cb = collections.Counter(B)
    # multiset intersection
    inter = sum((ca & cb).values())
    prec = inter / len(A) if A else 0
    rec  = inter / len(B) if B else 0
    if prec + rec == 0:
        return 0
    return 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)

f1 = token_f1(orig_full, cand['ayah_text'])
f1

# Compute token F1 for all ayat to find best match
scores = []
for v in quran:
    score = token_f1(orig_full, v['ayah_text'])
    if score > 0:
        scores.append((score, v))
scores_sorted = sorted(scores, key=lambda x: -x[0])
len(scores_sorted), scores_sorted[:10][0][0], [(s, v['surah_id'], v['ayah_id']) for s, v in scores_sorted[:5]]

# Compute LCS normalized length ratio
def lcs_length(a,b):
    A = normalize_arabic(a)
    B = normalize_arabic(b)
    n, m = len(A), len(B)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1,n+1):
        prev = 0
        for j in range(1,m+1):
            temp = dp[j]
            if A[i-1]==B[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev+1
            else:
                dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev = temp
    return dp[m], n, m

def lcs_ratio(a,b):
    l, n, m = lcs_length(a,b)
    return l / max(n,m) if max(n,m)>0 else 0

ratios = []
for v in quran:
    r = lcs_ratio(orig_full, v['ayah_text'])
    ratios.append((r, v))
ratios_sorted = sorted(ratios, key=lambda x: -x[0])
ratios_sorted[:5][0][0], [(r, v['surah_id'], v['ayah_id']) for r, v in ratios_sorted[:5]]
